Discover Your Adventure

Explore
The Galapagos

Join us on a sustainable journey through the most extraordinary archipelago on Earth. Crafting bespoke memories since 2005.

Explore Now
Plan Your Trip
Our Commitment

Sustainable Travel in
Ecuador & Galapagos

Established in 2008, EOS Ecuador is more than a travel agency; we are guardians of responsible tourism. We specialize in crafting unforgettable journeys, from private cruises in the Galapagos to deep immersion in the Amazon rainforest.

Our philosophy is built on personalization and purpose. Each tour is tailored to your vision, allowing you to discover Ecuador's extraordinary biodiversity while contributing directly to local communities. Join us in exploring the beauty of our country, sustainably.

The Enchanted Islands

Galapagos

Experience the ultimate wildlife encounter in a volcanic paradise that changed science forever.

Discover More

Untamed Rainforest

Amazon

Venture into the world's most biodiverse ecosystem, home to unique wildlife and ancestral cultures.

Discover More

Tailored Adventures

Custom Tours

Create your own adventure with our custom tour packages.

Discover More

Climbing & Trekking

Volcanoes

Conquer the Avenue of the Volcanoes and witness the majestic power of the Ecuadorian Andes.

Discover More

Endless Ways to Experience Ecuador

Whether you want to cruise the Galapagos islands, climb active volcanoes, or explore ancient cities—discover the unparalleled biodiversity, breathtaking sceneries, and vibrant cultures that Ecuador offers to every traveler.

Cruise the Galapagos

Navigate through the enchanted islands and witness unique wildlife that inspired scientific revolutions.

Climb Volcanoes

Conquer the Avenue of the Volcanoes and stand in awe of the world's most impressive Andean peaks.

Raft Spectacular Rivers

Feel the rush of adrenaline as you navigate world-class rapids surrounded by lush tropical rainforests.

Trek Cloud Forests

Hike through mystical paramo landscapes and cloud forests, discovering hidden waterfalls and exotic bird species.

Bike the Countryside

Pedal through breathtaking sceneries, indigenous villages, and ancient trails across the Andean highlands.

Explore Historic Cities

Step back in time as you wander through UNESCO World Heritage sites and stunning colonial architecture.

A World of Biodiversity Awaits

From the lush Amazon rainforest to the peaks of the Andes and the shores of the Pacific, Ecuador is a sanctuary for Earth's most incredible flora and fauna. Every tour we craft is designed to immerse you respectfully in this natural wonder.
